source: https://www.ethnews.com/franklin-templeton-turns-treasury-funds-into-stablecoin-reserve-infrastructure/

data.title: Crypto Investor’s Family Tied Up and Beaten by Armed Gangs in Their Home
data.description:
Three armed men invaded a crypto investor's home in Verneuil-sur-Seine, France, binding and beating the family before fleeing, as France leads global crypto-related violence with 14 documented attacks following revelations that criminals exploit government tax databases to identify and target cryptocurrency holders.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/crypto-investors-family-tied-up-and-beaten-by-armed-gangs-in-their-home/

data.title: South Korea’s Korbit fined $2 million for money laundering
data.description:
The South Korean crypto exchange Korbit has accepted a fine of nearly $2 million. The exchange also has an official warning for widespread failures in its AML and customer verification systems. In a statement, Korbit stated, “We respectfully and humbly accept the Financial Intelligence Unit’s decision to impose a fine. […] Despite the difficult circumstances, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/korbit-fined-2-million-for-money-laundering/

data.title: CZ Warns Traders About Meme Coins Tied to His Tweets — Here Is Why He’s Urging Caution
data.description:
CZ, the CEO of Binance, has issued a stern warning to traders regarding the potential risks associated with investing in meme coins that are linked to his tweets. He emphasizes the importance of exercising caution and due diligence before jumping into these volatile assets. In his statement, he outlines several reasons for this advisory, highlighting the unpredictable nature of meme coins, their tendency for rapid price fluctuations, and the influence that social media can have on market sentiment. CZ believes that while meme coins may seem appealing due to their explosive growth potential, investors should be wary of the risks involved, especially when making decisions based solely on social media activity. He urges traders to conduct thorough research and consider the fundamentals of any cryptocurrency before investing.
source: https://blocknews.com/cz-warns-traders-about-meme-coins-tied-to-his-tweets-here-is-why-hes-urging-caution/
